_comment: PINNED YuNet face-detection model for the IMMUTABLE Phase-6 visual component. The .onnx is COMMITTED at worker/models/face_detection_yunet_2023mar.onnx (232589 bytes) and this manifest pins its exact upstream identity: the opencv_zoo commit, the in-repo path, and the artifact sha256 (verified to equal the repo's Git-LFS pointer oid). editor_visual.py re-hashes the loaded file against `files` and FAILS CLOSED (exit 3) on any mismatch. Changing repository/ref/digest requires bumping the analyzer bundle (VISUAL_ANALYSIS_VERSION) — the artifact hash is an input to the visual componentDigest.
